practical: Dirty Harry’s choice. Devastating, long-barrel revolver with huge recoil.
visual: Glossy blued finish, long heavy barrel, hardwood grips, six-shot cylinder.

practical: Tank-like build, excellent balance of stopping power and control.
visual: Brushed stainless frame, full-lug barrel, black rubber grips with wood inserts.

practical: Elite revolver. Smooth trigger, premium machining, collector’s favorite.
visual: Polished stainless finish, full underlug, vented rib barrel, gold Colt medallions.

practical: Shotgun-shell revolver. Devastating at point blank, poor accuracy beyond.
visual: Massive cylinder, matte black, thick barrel and recoil-absorbing grip.

practical: Old Tsarist-era design. Gassy trigger, but unique gas-seal cylinder.
visual: Antique steel finish, small grip, offset barrel above long gap-to-cylinder.

practical: Low bore axis revolver. Strange looks, minimal muzzle flip, futuristic handling.
visual: Angular matte body, bottom-firing barrel, fiber optic sights.

practical: Balanced six-shooter. Duty-sized frame, versatile and durable.
visual: Satin stainless, checkered grip, broad rear sight notch, target hammer.

practical: Heavy-hitting backcountry revolver. Serious weight, serious impact.
visual: Brushed stainless bulk, oversize cylinder, thick rubberized grips.

practical: Snub-nose concealment icon. Limited range, fast draw.
visual: Rounded frame, blued steel, short barrel, wood service grip.

practical: Modern polymer revolver. Ultra-light, DAO trigger, better recoil than expected.
visual: Matte black polymer body, cylinder fluting, scalloped grip.
